svg.title: Logi Lift — LinguaX slot layout
svg.desc: Top-down photo of the Logi Lift vertical mouse with LinguaX-mappable slots labelled: M wheel click, T top DPI / pointer-speed key, S1 and S2 side buttons on the thumb flank. The main plates carry L / R main clicks. Wheel tilt (WL / WR) is not exposed as a slot on the Lift.
svg.text: Logi Lift — 4 configurable slots (M · T · S1 · S2)
